OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianCreateManualOnboardingIP

childElements.name: LA_ModifyFacilityCases
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "IP_GetSelectedRecords:SelectedRecordList" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "SV_CaseFields:caseFields", "updateFieldValue" : { "caseAccountId" : "=hpfFacilityAccountId", "casePriority" : "=priority", "caseHPFId" : "=hpfRecordId", "caseType" : "=\"Facility\"", "caseOrigin" : "=\"Automatic\"", "caseSubject" : "=CONCAT(\"Manual Onboarding - \",FacilityName)" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: RA_NoFacilitySelected
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%IP_GetSelectedRecords:SelectedRecordList|1%==$Vlocity.NULL", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "noFacilitySelected" : true }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRT_TransformSCPCase
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "scpPriority" : "=%scpPriority%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "scpCaseList" : "=LIST(%DRT_TransformSCPCase:scpCase%)" }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "TransformSCPOnboardingCaseDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: IP_GetSelectedRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "RecordList" : "=%hpfList%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "SelectedRecordList" : "=LIST(%IP_GetSelectedRecords:SelectedRecord%)" }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Clinician_VerifyRecordSelectedIP", "remoteOptions" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "disableChainable" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_MergeBothCaseList
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "LA_ModifyFacilityCases", "DRT_TransformSCPCase:scpCaseList" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Load_OnboardingCases
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "IF(%onboardingType% == \"SCP\" && SV_CaseFields:existingSCPCasesCount > 0, $Vlocity.FALSE, $Vlocity.TRUE)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "caseList" : "=LIST(%LA_MergeBothCaseList%)", "caseRecordTypeId" : "=%onboardingCaseRTId%", "caseStatus" : "=\"Not Started\"", "caseContactId" : "=%clinicianId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadOnboardingCaseDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: RA_Return
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "noFacilitySelected" : false }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_CaseFields
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "caseFields" : "=\"caseSubject,caseAccountId,casePriority,caseHPFId,caseType,caseOrigin\"", "existingSCPCasesCount" : "=COUNTQUERY ( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Case WHERE ContactId = '{0}' AND Type = '{1}' AND ParentId = '{2}' AND Status != '{3}'\" , %clinicianId%, \"SCP\",\"\", \"Closed\")" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
